english: When is your birthday?

translations.en: When is your birthday?
translations.ja: あなたの誕生日はいつですか？

english: My birthday is on November twenty-first.

translations.en: My birthday is on November twenty-first.
translations.ja: 私の誕生日は11月21日です。

english: What sports do you like?

translations.en: What sports do you like?
translations.ja: あなたは何のスポーツが好きですか？

english: I like soccer and basketball.

translations.en: I like soccer and basketball.
translations.ja: 私はサッカーとバスケットボールが好きです。

english: Do you like Japanese food?

translations.en: Do you like Japanese food?
translations.ja: 日本食は好きですか？

english: Yes I like rice and fish.

translations.en: Yes I like rice and fish.
translations.ja: はい、ご飯とお魚が好きです。

english: Can you play the piano?

translations.en: Can you play the piano?
translations.ja: ピアノを弾くことができますか？

english: Yes I can play well.

translations.en: Yes I can play well.
translations.ja: はい、上手に弾けます。

english: Where is your new bicycle?

translations.en: Where is your new bicycle?
translations.ja: あなたの新しい自転車はどこですか？

english: It is at my house.

translations.en: It is at my house.
translations.ja: それは私の家にあります。

english: I eat lunch now.

translations.en: I eat lunch now.
translations.ja: 私は今お昼ご飯を食べます。

english: I study English every day.

translations.en: I study English every day.
translations.ja: 私は毎日英語を勉強します。

english: This blue pen is mine.

translations.en: This blue pen is mine.
translations.ja: この青いペンは私のものです。

english: Look at that red flower.

translations.en: Look at that red flower.
translations.ja: あの赤い花を見て。

english: I have two small dogs.

translations.en: I have two small dogs.
translations.ja: 私は小さな犬を2匹飼っています。

english: We go to school together.

translations.en: We go to school together.
translations.ja: 私たちは一緒に学校へ行きます。

english: The weather is hot today.

translations.en: The weather is hot today.
translations.ja: 今日の天気は暑いです。

english: Please open the window now.

translations.en: Please open the window now.
translations.ja: 今、窓を開けてください。

english: I like Sunday morning sleep.

translations.en: I like Sunday morning sleep.
translations.ja: 私は日曜日の朝寝るのが好きです。

english: Welcome to our town.

translations.en: Welcome to our town.
translations.ja: 私たちの町へようこそ。

english: Could you say that again?

translations.en: Could you say that again?
translations.ja: もう一度言っていただけますか？

english: Yes I can say it.

translations.en: Yes I can say it.
translations.ja: はい、言えますよ。

english: Where is the bus stop?

translations.en: Where is the bus stop?
translations.ja: バス停はどこですか？

english: It is over there.

translations.en: It is over there.
translations.ja: あそこにありますよ。

english: Are you ready now?

translations.en: Are you ready now?
translations.ja: もう準備はいいですか？

english: Yes I am ready.

translations.en: Yes I am ready.
translations.ja: はい、準備できました。

english: Can I have some water?

translations.en: Can I have some water?
translations.ja: お水を少しいただけますか？

english: Here is your water.

translations.en: Here is your water.
translations.ja: お水はこちらです。

english: Where is the room key?

translations.en: Where is the room key?
translations.ja: 部屋の鍵はどこですか？

english: It is on the desk.

translations.en: It is on the desk.
translations.ja: 机の上にあります。

english: Please open the door.

translations.en: Please open the door.
translations.ja: ドアを開けてください。

english: Show me the map please.

translations.en: Show me the map please.
translations.ja: 地図を見せてください。

english: Please call a doctor now.

translations.en: Please call a doctor now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ医者を呼んでください。

english: Wait for me over there.

translations.en: Wait for me over there.
translations.ja: あそこで待っていて。

english: Look at the blue sky.

translations.en: Look at the blue sky.
translations.ja: 青い空を見て。

english: Stop the car right now.

translations.en: Stop the car right now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ車を止めて。

english: Sit down on the chair.

translations.en: Sit down on the chair.
translations.ja: 椅子に座って。

english: Look at the big moon.

translations.en: Look at the big moon.
translations.ja: 大きな月を見て。

english: Open the small window please.

translations.en: Open the small window please.
translations.ja: 小さな窓を開けてください。

english: Give me the pen.

translations.en: Give me the pen.
translations.ja: ペンをください。

english: What are you doing this weekend?

translations.en: What are you doing this weekend?
translations.ja: 今週末は何をしますか？

english: I want to go shopping with Mari.

translations.en: I want to go shopping with Mari.
translations.ja: 私はまりと一緒に買い物に行きたいです。

english: How is the weather today?

translations.en: How is the weather today?
translations.ja: 今日の天気はどうですか？

english: It is a beautiful sunny day.

translations.en: It is a beautiful sunny day.
translations.ja: とても気持ちの良い晴れの日です。

english: Do you like to play piano?

translations.en: Do you like to play piano?
translations.ja: ピアノを弾くのは好きですか？

english: Yes I practice it every day.

translations.en: Yes I practice it every day.
translations.ja: はい、毎日練習しています。

english: Can you hear my voice now?

translations.en: Can you hear my voice now?
translations.ja: 私の声が今聞こえますか？

english: No please speak a little louder.

translations.en: No please speak a little louder.
translations.ja: いいえ、もう少し大きな声で話してください。

english: What do you want to eat?

translations.en: What do you want to eat?
translations.ja: あなたは何を食べたいですか？

english: I want some hot delicious soup.

translations.en: I want some hot delicious soup.
translations.ja: 温かくて美味しいスープが食べたいです。

english: I want to see the movie.

translations.en: I want to see the movie.
translations.ja: その映画を見たいです。

english: I am sorry for being late.

translations.en: I am sorry for being late.
translations.ja: 遅れてすみません。

english: I want to read a story.

translations.en: I want to read a story.
translations.ja: 物語を読みたいです。

english: I am happy to meet you.

translations.en: I am happy to meet you.
translations.ja: お会いできて嬉しいです。

english: I want to go outside now.

translations.en: I want to go outside now.
translations.ja: 今、外に行きたいです。

english: I like tea and orange juice.

translations.en: I like tea and orange juice.
translations.ja: 私はお茶とオレンジジュースが好きです。

english: We love to study new languages.

translations.en: We love to study new languages.
translations.ja: 私たちは新しい言語を勉強するのが大好きです。

english: My sister likes to draw pictures.

translations.en: My sister likes to draw pictures.
translations.ja: 私の姉は絵を描くのが好きです。

english: We plan to climb a mountain.

translations.en: We plan to climb a mountain.
translations.ja: 私たちは山に登る計画をしています。

english: This shirt is very comfortable.

translations.en: This shirt is very comfortable.
translations.ja: このシャツはとても着心地が良いです。

english: Does your father work near the train station?

translations.en: Does your father work near the train station?
translations.ja: あなたのお父さんは駅の近くで働いていますか？

english: Yes he works at the city hospital.

translations.en: Yes he works at the city hospital.
translations.ja: はい、彼は市内の病院で働いています。

english: Where do local people usually buy fresh vegetables?

translations.en: Where do local people usually buy fresh vegetables?
translations.ja: 地元の人は普段どこで新鮮な野菜を買いますか？

english: They always go to the big green market.

translations.en: They always go to the big green market.
translations.ja: 彼らはいつも大きなグリーンマーケットに行きます。

english: When does the science museum welcome visitors?

translations.en: When does the science museum welcome visitors?
translations.ja: 科学博物館はいつ訪問者を歓迎していますか？

english: It opens for everyone early every morning.

translations.en: It opens for everyone early every morning.
translations.ja: 毎朝早く、すべての人に向けて開館しています。

english: How often do you visit the local library?

translations.en: How often do you visit the local library?
translations.ja: 地元の図書館にはどのくらいの頻度で通っていますか？

english: We go there together about once a week.

translations.en: We go there together about once a week.
translations.ja: 私たちは週に一度ほど、そこに一緒に行きます。

english: Where do they live in this town?

translations.en: Where do they live in this town?
translations.ja: 彼らはこの町のどこの場所に住んでいますか？

english: They live in a big house near forest.

translations.en: They live in a big house near forest.
translations.ja: 彼らは森の近くの大きな家に住んでいます。

english: My father works at the office in city.

translations.en: My father works at the office in city.
translations.ja: 父は街のオフィスで働いています。

english: We have a party on the last day.

translations.en: We have a party on the last day.
translations.ja: 私たちは最終日にパーティーを開きます。

english: I go to the post office every Monday.

translations.en: I go to the post office every Monday.
translations.ja: 毎週月曜日に郵便局へ行きます。

english: Many people visit the park in the spring.

translations.en: Many people visit the park in the spring.
translations.ja: 春には多くの人がその公園を訪れます。

english: She helps the old lady with the bags.

translations.en: She helps the old lady with the bags.
translations.ja: 彼女はお年寄りの荷物を持つのを助けます。

english: We follow the school rules to be good.

translations.en: We follow the school rules to be good.
translations.ja: 私たちは良い子であるために校則を守ります。

english: The city has a big stadium for games.

translations.en: The city has a big stadium for games.
translations.ja: その都市には試合用の大きなスタジアムがあります。

english: They work together every day in the hall.

translations.en: They work together every day in the hall.
translations.ja: 彼らは毎日、会館で一緒に働いています。

english: The police station is far from the center.

translations.en: The police station is far from the center.
translations.ja: 警察署は中心部から遠いです。

english: We save water at home for our nature.

translations.en: We save water at home for our nature.
translations.ja: 自然のために家で節水しています。

english: Do you want something to drink?

translations.en: Do you want something to drink?
translations.ja: 何か飲み物は欲しいですか？

english: Give me some cold juice please.

translations.en: Give me some cold juice please.
translations.ja: 冷たいジュースをください。

english: Must we finish this report today?

translations.en: Must we finish this report today?
translations.ja: 私たちは今日、このレポートを終わらせなければなりませんか？

english: No you can submit it tomorrow.

translations.en: No you can submit it tomorrow.
translations.ja: いいえ、明日提出すれば大丈夫です。

english: Why must you buy a dictionary?

translations.en: Why must you buy a dictionary?
translations.ja: なぜ辞書を買わなければならないのですか？

english: I need a book to study.

translations.en: I need a book to study.
translations.ja: 勉強するための本が必要です。

english: Is there any place to visit?

translations.en: Is there any place to visit?
translations.ja: どこか訪れるべき場所はありますか？

english: There are many places to see.

translations.en: There are many places to see.
translations.ja: 見るべき場所がたくさんありますよ。

english: Should we check the map again?

translations.en: Should we check the map again?
translations.ja: もう一度地図を確認すべきですか？

english: Yes to find the correct way.

translations.en: Yes to find the correct way.
translations.ja: はい、正しい道を見つけるために。

english: We must protect our clean river.

translations.en: We must protect our clean river.
translations.ja: 私たちはきれいな川を守らなければなりません。

english: He has a lot of homework.

translations.en: He has a lot of homework.
translations.ja: 彼は宿題がたくさんあります。

english: She likes to study in library.

translations.en: She likes to study in library.
translations.ja: 彼女は図書館で勉強するのが好きです。

english: I am looking for a chair.

translations.en: I am looking for a chair.
translations.ja: 私は椅子を探しています。

english: We need to find the truth.

translations.en: We need to find the truth.
translations.ja: 私たちは真実を見つける必要があります。

english: Every problem has a clear solution.

translations.en: Every problem has a solution.
translations.ja: すべての問題には明確な解決策があります。

english: Follow the logical steps here carefully.

translations.en: Follow the logical steps here carefully.
translations.ja: ここにある論理的なステップに慎重に従ってください。

english: Change is good for our society.

translations.en: Change is good for our society.
translations.ja: 変化は私たちの社会にとって良いことです。

english: I understand your great speech now.

translations.en: I understand your great speech now.
translations.ja: あなたの素晴らしいスピーチが今理解できました。

english: Consider the safety rules first here.

translations.en: Consider the safety rules first here.
translations.ja: ここではまず安全規則を考慮してください。
